extension.summary: Catch-Up TV & More : Télévision de rattrapage, télévision en direct et bien plus encore.
extension.description: Catch-Up TV & More regroupe dans une même extension de Kodi l'ensemble des vidéos des différents services et chaînes de rattrapage TV ainsi que l'accès au direct. De plus, cette extension vous permet d'accéder rapidement aux vidéos et contenus proposés par certains sites internet.
extension.disclaimer: Retours de bugs, propositions d'améliorations ou d'ajout de contenus sont les bienvenue ! GitHub ou e-mail.
extension.summary: Catch-Up TV & More: It's all in the title.
extension.description: Catch-Up TV & More brings together in one Kodi add-on all the videos of the various services and channels of catch-up TV and live TV. Furthermore, this add-on allows you to quickly access the videos and content offered by certain websites.
extension.disclaimer: Bug reports, suggestions for improvements or content additions are welcome! GitHub or e-mail.
extension.description: ההרחבה מאפשרת לך להתעדכן בתוכן השידורים תוסף אחד של קודי מרכז את כל קטעי וידאו של שירותים שונים וערוצי תוכן משודר. בנוסף, תוספת זו מאפשרת לך לגשת במהירות לסרטונים ולתכנים המוצעים על ידי אתרים מסוימים.
extension.disclaimer: דוחות שגיאה, הצעות לשיפור או תוספות תוכן יתקבלו בברכה! ל-GitHub או אימייל.
extension.summary: Catch-Up TV & More: Replay tv, Live tv en meer.
extension.description: Catch-Up TV & More brengt replay en live tv van verschikkende diensten en kanalen samen in één Kodi add-on. Bovendien stelt deze add-on u instaat video's van bepaalde websites makkelijk te benaderen.
extension.disclaimer: Bug meldingen, suggesties ter verbetering of additionele inhouden zijn welkom! Via GitHub of e-mail.
extension.news: [Version 0.2.41] [FR - TELEGRENOBLE] TELEGRENOBLE is TG+ now [JP - QVC] Fix live [FR - LCP] Fix live error (PR #1705) thanks @jeff2900 [UK - MY5] Change HMAC key retrival (PR #1715 issue #1713) thanks @nictjir [MA - MEDI1TV] Fix live (PR #1718) thanks @asperMcFadden95 [FR - FRANCETV] Kodi22 fix live error 403 (PR #1717) thanks @jeff2900 [FR - T18] Fix replay AttributeError (PR #1722) thanks @ jeff2900 [UK - MY5] Replay: empty lists no longer return HTTP 404 status (PR #1724 issue #1721) thanks @dinkroom [FR - TGPLUS] Fix live [UK - MY5] Swapped order of HMAC and AES (PR #1725 issue #1726) thanks @dinkroom [WEB - TARATATA] Improves video quality (PR #1728 issue #1377) thanks @jeff2900 [FR - EUROPE1] FIx live [FR - MOSELLETV] Fix live [FR - TNTV] Fix live [UK - MY5] Swap and retry HMAC key with stored order (PR #1730 issue #1732) thanks @dinkroom [FR - TV7BORDEAUX] Fix live [UK - WATCHFREEUK] Fix page legend has no items (PR #1735) thanks @dinkroom [PROJECT] Get local timezone from Kodi settings (PR #1737) thanks @dinkroom [UK - MY5] Replay: Improved display of special events FAST (PR #1737 issue #1736) thanks @dinkroom [RO] Added support for Romanian channels (PR #1738) thanks @qvalette ---- Visit WebSite - http://mpdb.tv/#home which host the french forum used by users of CU TV and More
